name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: McKinney, TX location of ACE Cash Express at 401 S Central Expy offers payday and title loans with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express at 401 S Central Expy in McKinney, TX operates as a standalone storefront offering quick financial solutions to McKinney residents and surrounding areas. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM and Saturday from 9AM to 6PM, with Sunday closures, providing convenient access for those seeking immediate cash options.

This McKinney location specializes in payday loans and title loans, designed for individuals needing rapid access to funds. Customers can reach the branch at +1 972-562-6728 to discuss their specific borrowing needs, verify current terms, or ask questions about documentation requirements before visiting in person.

If you're a McKinney resident facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash gap, this Central Expy location provides a straightforward alternative to traditional banking. Bring a valid ID, recent pay stubs, and proof of income; the team will walk you through the application process quickly.
pros: Multiple service offerings beyond emergency loans including check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Both physical store locations and online loan application options available
Nationwide store network across multiple states with location-based services
Dedicated customer service channels with phone and email support
Offers title loans as an alternative emergency funding option
Business services available in addition to consumer products
Long-established brand with customer loyalty program
Clear service menu accessible from homepage
cons: No loan terms, APR rates, or fee information disclosed on accessible website content
Website contains 404 errors on location-specific pages, limiting current information verification
Website appears potentially outdated (Hurricane Ida reference suggests older content)
No information about state availability, eligibility requirements, or loan amounts
Limited transparency on credit requirements or approval process
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with multiple service location options
Vehicle owners seeking title-based emergency loans
People requiring bundled financial services beyond emergency loans (check cashing, bill payment, tax prep)
Consumers in areas with established ACE store locations
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers with immediate cash needs who have access to physical store locations and value the convenience of bundled financial services in one location. The primary caveat is complete lack of transparency regarding loan terms, rates, and fees on the accessible website—consumers must contact ACE directly or visit a store to understand actual borrowing costs before proceeding.
meta_description: McKinney, TX - ACE Cash Express at 401 S Central Expy offers fast payday and title loans, open Monday–Saturday.
